description.ko: 빛과 어둠이 존재의 가장자리에서 춤추는 우주의 깊은 침묵과 무한한 규모를 탐험하는 몰입형 여정입니다.
description.en: An immersive exploration into the profound silence and infinite scale of the cosmos, where light and darkness dance at the edge of existence.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a cosmic abyss, swirling deep indigo and violet nebulae, shimmering distant star clusters, dark matter filaments, minimalist abstract composition, ethereal glow, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution, serene atmosphere.
